name: goliath/wg-vs-standard
title: Why Goliath vs Standard Repair
description: Two-column comparison of traditional repair vs the Goliath method, plus a three-image grid.

tradP.default: Traditional pallet racking repair’s sole focus is on replacing damaged uprights. This means uprights have to be damaged first before being repaired. The biggest problem with standard repair is that it doesn’t prevent the same issue from happening again.

tradBold.default: This means uprights are replaced and eventually damaged again.

golP.default: Instead of repeatedly replacing the upright with the standard system, the upright is replaced with our high-strength steel repair system. Goliath™ is built to brace for impact, ensuring the structure is stronger and more resilient to handle high-traffic environments more effectively.

golBold.default: While standard repair methods are reactive, Goliath™ is a permanent upgrade for future circumstances.

img1Alt.default: Goliath upright repair solution installed in warehouse

img2Alt.default: Close-up of Goliath repair kit in use
